faqData.question: What is the typical project timeline?
faqData.answer: Most projects range from 6-12 weeks depending on scope and complexity. We provide detailed timelines during the Define phase with clear milestones and deliverables. AI-enhanced projects often complete 30-40% faster than traditional development.

faqData.question: How do you price your services?
faqData.answer: We offer flexible pricing based on project scope and complexity. Our packages typically range from $15K-30K (Starter), $30K-60K (Standard), to $60K+ (Enterprise). Each quote is customized based on your specific requirements and business goals.

faqData.question: Do you provide ongoing maintenance and support?
faqData.answer: Yes, we offer comprehensive maintenance packages including 24/7 monitoring, security updates, performance optimization, content management support, and regular backups. Our support plans start at $500/month for basic maintenance.

faqData.question: Can you work with our existing team and tools?
faqData.answer: Absolutely. We integrate seamlessly with in-house teams and can adapt to your existing workflows. We provide comprehensive documentation, training sessions, and collaborative workflows using tools like Slack, Figma, GitHub, and your preferred project management platform.

faqData.question: What makes CHIRO different from other web development agencies?
faqData.answer: Our key differentiators include AI-powered development workflows (40% faster delivery), guaranteed accessibility compliance, proven performance optimization (90+ Lighthouse scores), and comprehensive documentation. We focus on measurable business results, not just pretty websites.

faqData.question: Do you work with startups or only enterprise clients?
faqData.answer: We work with both growing startups and established enterprises. Our flexible package structure accommodates different budget levels and business stages. Startups benefit from our rapid development approach, while enterprises appreciate our scalable architecture and compliance focus.
